recommendations.title: Charlie Countryman
recommendations.overview: A young American falls hard for a Romanian cellist whose father has recently died -- and whose violent past could bring about his own demise.

recommendations.title: The Vexxer
recommendations.overview: Scotland Yard investigators have to prevent the murder of Victoria Dickman when her name is found on a death list.

recommendations.title: Dirty Harry
recommendations.overview: When a madman dubbed 'Scorpio' terrorizes San Francisco, hard-nosed cop, Harry Callahan – famous for his take-no-prisoners approach to law enforcement – is tasked with hunting down the psychopath.

recommendations.title: The Trixxer
recommendations.overview: A mysterious serial killer is shocking the underworld. Scotland Yard is investigating the case. Clues lead the detectives to Blackwhite Castle.

recommendations.title: 48 Hrs.
recommendations.overview: A hard-nosed cop reluctantly teams up with a wise-cracking criminal temporarily paroled to him, in order to track down a killer.

recommendations.title: Damaged
recommendations.overview: A Chicago detective travels to Scotland after an emerging serial killer’s crimes match those that he investigated five years earlier, one of which was the crime scene of his murdered girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Continental Divide
recommendations.overview: A hard-nosed Chicago journalist has an unlikely love affair with an eagle researcher.

recommendations.title: Landmine Goes Click
recommendations.overview: After an American tourist steps on a landmine, he is forced to watch his girlfriend get assaulted.

recommendations.title: The Woman in Green
recommendations.overview: Sherlock Holmes investigates when young women around London turn up murdered, each with a finger severed. Scotland Yard suspects a madman, but Holmes believes the killings to be part of a diabolical plot.

recommendations.title: Dial M for Murder
recommendations.overview: When her American lover visits London, a wealthy woman’s jealous husband hatches a plan to murder her and inherit her fortune.
